originalTitle: Live RL dev on PufferLib with Joseph Suarez
title: Profiling and Fixing Vectorization Scaling, Merging Kernel PR, and Achieving 11.8M SPS
summary: Profiled and debugged vectorized environment stepping in PufferLib, fixing a bug with device synchronization and identifying memory-bound scaling limitations. Implemented a parallel buffer rollout approach using OpenMP, inspired by contributor Peru, and merged a contributor's kernel improvements, achieving 11.8 million steps per second.
